introSection: Trombi was a steel flying roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Trombi opened on 30 April 2005. The ride closed in 2023 and was demolished in late 2024.

fullText:
Trombi was a steel flying roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.

Trombi opened on 30 April 2005. The ride closed in 2023 and was demolished in late 2024.
